title: heterotheca villosa var. ballardii
intro: Heterotheca villosa var. ballardii, also known as Ballard's False Goldentop, is a variety of the Heterotheca villosa plant, a flowering perennial native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, due to the presence of essential oils and sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Heterotheca villosa var. ballardii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, with herbal preparations often using the flowers and leaves of the plant for medicinal purposes.
